expected_subtasks.title: Design onboarding wireframes
expected_subtasks.description: Create UI designs for new onboarding flow

expected_subtasks.title: Run user testing
expected_subtasks.description: Test with 5-10 users and collect feedback

expected_subtasks.title: Launch with feature flag
expected_subtasks.description: Deploy behind feature flag for gradual rollout

what_good_breakdown_looks_like: 5-6 subtasks covering design, content, frontend, backend, testing, launch.
acceptable_variation: May have 5-7 subtasks. Must include design, implementation, testing, launch.
notes: Complex product launch. Must include design, build, test, and phased launch.
